item.title: F-007: Dark and Light Mode
item.intent: The app must look intentionally designed in both dark and light modes — not just inverted colors, but a considered palette for each
item.description: Defaults to system preference. User can override to always-light or always-dark. All UI elements, editor chrome, rendered markdown, and syntax highlighting adapt. All themes meet WCAG AA contrast ratios. Theme transitions animated (crossfade 200ms) with Reduced Motion alternative (instant switch).
acceptanceCriteria: Toggling iOS dark mode causes the app to switch immediately
All text, backgrounds, and UI elements are legible and intentionally designed in both modes
Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA in both modes
Theme override preference persists across app updates
Dynamic theme switch during editing causes no text loss, no cursor jump
Theme transition animates with 200ms crossfade between modes
Reduced Motion setting triggers instant switch instead of animated crossfade
